# Smartbookly

> All-in-One CRM, Bookings, Task Management, Calendar and AI Assistant for modern businesses.

Smartbookly is a SaaS productivity platform that combines customer relationship management, an online booking system, calendar scheduling, task management and team chat in one place — augmented by an AI assistant that helps create reminders, manage events and analyze customers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features and pricing.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Smartbookly team.
- [Legal](/legal): Terms of service and privacy policy.
